remember: Students will be able to define the term climate and explain its importance.
Students will be able to identify and describe the major climate types of the world.
Students will be able to recall the factors influencing climate.
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of climate change and its impact on the environment.
Students will be able to describe the relationship between climate and human activities.
Students will be able to understand the differences between weather and climate.
apply: Students will be able to apply their knowledge of climate to real-life situations and explain the consequences of climate change.
Students will be able to use climate data to analyze and predict climate-related trends.
Students will be able to propose measures to mitigate the effects of climate change.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the causes and effects of climate change at the global and local levels.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of human activities on climate and the environment.
Students will be able to compare and contrast different climate types and their characteristics.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1, to understand the concept of climate and its types.
As per NCERT objective 2, to analyze the factors influencing climate.
As per NCERT objective 3, to explain the concept of climate change and its consequences.
board_exam_objectives: What CBSE tests from this chapter: Map skills related to climate, short answer questions on climate types and climate change, and long answer questions on the impact of human activities on climate.
